holdings.infoBox: FTXO is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Citigroup stock at 9.33%, Bank of America at 8.16%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 7.74%, Wells Fargo & Company at 7.43%, and Truist Financial at 7.16%.

overview.description: The First Trust Nasdaq Bank ETF (FTXO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ US Banks index. The fund tracks an index composed of the most liquid US banking companies. Holdings are selected by their liquidity, and weighted based on volatility, value, and growth factors. FTXO was launched on Sep 20, 2016 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: Banks are beneficiaries when economic momentum recovers: Tom Lee
data.text: Tom Lee, Fundstrat Global Advisors head of research, joins 'Closing Bell' to discuss the market close and why bank stocks have continued to lag.
